nodes.text: Employees can work from home up to 3 days a week during 10 AM to 3 PM EST core hours.
Full-time employees receive a $500 home office stipend.
Standing desks are an approved use of the home office stipend.
Product X is the company laptop.
Product X has a 3-year AppleCare warranty.
Product Y is the external monitor.
Product Y has a 1-year manufacturer warranty.
